name: Spam Reuben Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cut into 8 slices (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine sauerkraut, shredded Swiss cheese, and Thousand Island salad dressing.
2. Spread butter on one side of each bread slice.
3. On the unbuttered side of four bread slices, spread half of the sauerkraut mixture evenly.
4. Place two SPAM slices on top of each of the four bread slices with sauerkraut.
5. Cover each sandwich with the remaining sauerkraut mixture and sprinkle shredded Swiss cheese over the cheese.
6. Top each sandwich with the remaining bread slices, buttered-side up.
7. Heat a skillet or griddle over medium heat.
8. Place sandwiches on the hot surface and cook until the cheese melts and both sides are golden brown.
